description: The ability to access applications and information from anywhere, using any device. It focuses on workplace independence and mobility.

sub_pillars.name: PC, AI, Mobile Hardware
sub_pillars.description: Enterprise hardware platforms including laptops, desktops, and mobile devices used across the workforce.

sub_pillars.name: Endpoint OS
sub_pillars.description: Secure, lightweight operating systems designed to extend hardware lifecycles and reduce the local attack surface.

sub_pillars.name: Secure Enterprise Browser
sub_pillars.description: A secure workspace layer within the browser to manage SaaS and web apps without full VDI/DaaS.

vendors.name: Talon (Palo Alto Networks) - Talon Enterprise Browser

description: Solutions that deliver virtualized desktops and applications to simplify management and provide secure access to workloads.

sub_pillars.name: DaaS (Cloud PC)
sub_pillars.description: Cloud-hosted desktop-as-a-service platforms that deliver persistent or non-persistent Cloud PCs.

sub_pillars.name: DaaS (Service Provider)
sub_pillars.description: Managed desktop-as-a-service delivered through service providers and cloud infrastructure.

sub_pillars.name: VDI
sub_pillars.description: On-premises or hybrid virtual desktop infrastructure engines for delivering desktops and apps.

vendors.name: Citrix - Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops

description: Modernizing physical endpoint management with a focus on Digital Employee Experience (DEX).

sub_pillars.name: Unified Endpoint Mgmt (UEM)
sub_pillars.description: Unified tools for managing the lifecycle of mobile and desktop operating systems.

sub_pillars.name: Digital Employee Experience (DEX)
sub_pillars.description: Monitoring and real-time remediation tools to improve user productivity and reduce support tickets.

description: The foundation for safe access to apps and data, focusing on zero-trust principles.

sub_pillars.name: Endpoint Security
sub_pillars.description: Advanced threat detection and response at the device level.

sub_pillars.name: Identity & Access Mgmt (IAM)
sub_pillars.description: Verifying user identity as the first line of defense in the digital workspace.

sub_pillars.name: Secure Access Service Edge (SASE)
sub_pillars.description: Converged network and security services delivered from the cloud for secure access.

description: Decoupling applications from the OS through modern packaging and layering.

sub_pillars.name: App Layering & Streaming
sub_pillars.description: Tools that package and deliver apps dynamically to users without permanent installation.

sub_pillars.name: Application Readiness & Packaging
sub_pillars.description: Testing, compatibility, and packaging tools for enterprise application deployment.

sub_pillars.name: Apps Config & Asset Management
sub_pillars.description: Configuration management and IT asset tracking tools for application lifecycle management.

description: Enhancing productivity through Unified Communications and Workspace AI.

sub_pillars.name: Workspace AI
sub_pillars.description: Generative AI assistants integrated into the workspace to automate workflows.
